title: Passport Index Database
description: Tracking historical changes in passport rankings and visa requirements.

top_passport.sql: SELECT c.name as country, c.code as country_code, cr.year, cr.rank, cr.visa_free_count FROM Country c JOIN CountryRanking cr ON c.code = cr.country_code WHERE cr.year = CASE WHEN :year IS NULL OR :year = '' THEN (SELECT MAX(year) FROM CountryRanking) ELSE :year END ORDER BY cr.rank ASC LIMIT CASE WHEN :limit IS NULL OR :limit = '' THEN 20 ELSE :limit END
top_passport.title: Top Passport Rankings
top_passport.description: Shows countries with the strongest passports ranked by visa-free access. Default: top 20 countries for most recent year. Parameters: year=YYYY for historical data, limit=N to adjust results.

bottom_passport.sql: SELECT c.name as country, c.code as country_code, cr.year, cr.rank, cr.visa_free_count FROM Country c JOIN CountryRanking cr ON c.code = cr.country_code WHERE cr.year = CASE WHEN :year IS NULL OR :year = '' THEN (SELECT MAX(year) FROM CountryRanking) ELSE :year END ORDER BY cr.rank DESC LIMIT CASE WHEN :limit IS NULL OR :limit = '' THEN 20 ELSE :limit END
bottom_passport.title: Bottom Passport Rankings
bottom_passport.description: Shows countries with the most restricted passport access. Default: 20 countries for most recent year. Parameters: year=YYYY for historical data, limit=N to adjust results.

current_visa_reciprocity.sql: WITH reciprocity AS ( SELECT c1.name as from_country, c1.code as from_country_code, c2.name as to_country, c2.code as to_country_code, vr1.requirement_type as outbound_requirement, vr2.requirement_type as inbound_requirement, CASE WHEN vr1.requirement_type = vr2.requirement_type THEN 'Reciprocal' ELSE 'Non-reciprocal' END as relationship, vr1.effective_date FROM VisaRequirement vr1 JOIN VisaRequirement vr2 ON vr1.from_country = vr2.to_country AND vr1.to_country = vr2.from_country JOIN Country c1 ON vr1.from_country = c1.code JOIN Country c2 ON vr1.to_country = c2.code WHERE vr1.effective_date = ( SELECT MAX(effective_date) FROM VisaRequirement WHERE from_country = vr1.from_country AND to_country = vr1.to_country ) AND vr2.effective_date = ( SELECT MAX(effective_date) FROM VisaRequirement WHERE from_country = vr2.from_country AND to_country = vr2.to_country ) AND ( :from_country IS NULL OR :from_country = '' OR c1.code = UPPER(:from_country) OR LOWER(c1.name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(:from_country) || '%' ) AND ( :to_country IS NULL OR :to_country = '' OR c2.code = UPPER(:to_country) OR LOWER(c2.name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(:to_country) || '%' ) ) SELECT from_country, from_country_code, to_country, to_country_code, outbound_requirement, inbound_requirement, relationship, effective_date FROM reciprocity ORDER BY from_country, to_country LIMIT CASE WHEN :limit IS NULL OR :limit = '' THEN 100 ELSE :limit END;
current_visa_reciprocity.title: Current Visa Reciprocity
current_visa_reciprocity.description: Compares the current visa requirements between country pairs in both directions. Shows whether the relationship is symmetric today. Default: from Malaysia (MY). Parameters: from_country and to_country — accepts country codes (e.g., 'US') or partial names (e.g., 'united').

historical_visa_policy_changes.sql: SELECT vr2.effective_date as change_date, c1.name as from_country, c1.code as from_country_code, c2.name as to_country, c2.code as to_country_code, vr1.requirement_type as old_requirement, vr2.requirement_type as new_requirement, CASE WHEN vr1.requirement_type = 'visa_required' AND vr2.requirement_type IN ('visa_free', 'visa_on_arrival', 'visa_free_access', 'electronic_travel_authorisation') THEN 'Liberalization' WHEN vr1.requirement_type IN ('visa_free', 'visa_on_arrival', 'visa_free_access', 'electronic_travel_authorisation') AND vr2.requirement_type = 'visa_required' THEN 'Restriction' ELSE 'Policy Change' END as change_type FROM VisaRequirement vr1 JOIN VisaRequirement vr2 ON vr1.from_country = vr2.from_country AND vr1.to_country = vr2.to_country AND vr2.effective_date > vr1.effective_date JOIN Country c1 ON vr1.from_country = c1.code JOIN Country c2 ON vr1.to_country = c2.code WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM VisaRequirement vr3 WHERE vr3.from_country = vr1.from_country AND vr3.to_country = vr1.to_country AND vr3.effective_date > vr1.effective_date AND vr3.effective_date < vr2.effective_date ) AND (:from_country IS NULL OR :from_country = '' OR c1.code = UPPER(:from_country) OR LOWER(c1.name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(:from_country) || '%') AND (:to_country IS NULL OR :to_country = '' OR c2.code = UPPER(:to_country) OR LOWER(c2.name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(:to_country) || '%') AND ((:year_from IS NULL OR :year_from = '') OR CAST(strftime('%Y', vr2.effective_date) AS INTEGER) >= CAST(:year_from AS INTEGER)) AND ((:year_to IS NULL OR :year_to = '') OR CAST(strftime('%Y', vr2.effective_date) AS INTEGER) <= CAST(:year_to AS INTEGER)) ORDER BY vr2.effective_date DESC LIMIT CASE WHEN :limit IS NULL OR :limit = '' THEN 100 ELSE :limit END
historical_visa_policy_changes.title: Historical Visa Policy Changes
historical_visa_policy_changes.description: Tracks how visa policies between countries changed over time. Shows each policy transition with dates. Parameters: from_country and to_country — accepts country codes or partial names (e.g., 'singapore'), date range with year_from and year_to (e.g., 2020-2025).

global_visa_types_overview.sql: WITH selected_year AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN :year IS NULL OR :year = '' THEN (SELECT MAX(strftime('%Y', effective_date)) FROM VisaRequirement) ELSE :year END AS year ), latest_requirements AS ( SELECT vr.*, strftime('%Y', vr.effective_date) as req_year FROM VisaRequirement vr JOIN selected_year sy ON strftime('%Y', vr.effective_date) <= sy.year WHERE vr.effective_date = ( SELECT MAX(effective_date) FROM VisaRequirement WHERE from_country = vr.from_country AND to_country = vr.to_country AND strftime('%Y', effective_date) <= sy.year ) ) SELECT (SELECT year FROM selected_year) as year, requirement_type, COUNT(*) as count, ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM latest_requirements), 2) as percentage FROM latest_requirements GROUP BY requirement_type LIMIT CASE WHEN :limit IS NULL OR :limit = '' THEN 20 ELSE :limit END
global_visa_types_overview.title: Global Visa Types Overview
global_visa_types_overview.description: Shows the distribution of visa requirement types worldwide as of the selected year. Parameter: year=YYYY to view state at that year (includes all previous requirements).

passport_ranking_trends.sql: WITH yearly_ranks AS ( SELECT c.name as country, c.code as country_code, cr.year, cr.rank, cr.visa_free_count, LAG(cr.rank) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.country_code ORDER BY cr.year) as prev_rank, LAG(cr.visa_free_count) OVER (PARTITION BY cr.country_code ORDER BY cr.year) as prev_visa_free_count FROM CountryRanking cr JOIN Country c ON cr.country_code = c.code WHERE (:country_code IS NULL OR :country_code = '' OR c.code = UPPER(:country_code) OR LOWER(c.name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(:country_code) || '%') ) SELECT country, country_code, year, rank, visa_free_count, prev_rank, prev_visa_free_count, (prev_rank - rank) as rank_improvement, (visa_free_count - prev_visa_free_count) as visa_free_increase FROM yearly_ranks WHERE prev_rank IS NOT NULL ORDER BY year DESC, rank_improvement DESC LIMIT CASE WHEN :limit IS NULL OR :limit = '' THEN 100 ELSE :limit END
passport_ranking_trends.title: Passport Ranking Trends
passport_ranking_trends.description: Tracks year-over-year changes in passport rankings. Positive rank_improvement values show improvement. Parameter: country_code — accepts country codes (e.g., 'SG') or partial names (e.g., 'singapore').

passport_strength.sql: SELECT c.region, cr.year, ROUND(AVG(cr.rank), 2) as avg_rank, ROUND(AVG(cr.visa_free_count), 2) as avg_visa_free_count, MIN(cr.rank) as best_rank, MAX(cr.visa_free_count) as max_visa_free_count, COUNT(DISTINCT c.code) as countries_in_region FROM Country c JOIN CountryRanking cr ON c.code = cr.country_code AND cr.year = CASE WHEN :year IS NULL OR :year = '' THEN (SELECT MAX(year) FROM CountryRanking) ELSE :year END GROUP BY c.region, cr.year ORDER BY cr.year DESC, avg_rank ASC
passport_strength.title: Passport Strength by Region
passport_strength.description: Compares passport strength across world regions. Lower avg_rank means stronger passports. Parameter: year=YYYY for historical data.

regional_visa_patterns.sql: WITH latest_requirements AS ( SELECT vr.from_country, vr.to_country, vr.requirement_type FROM VisaRequirement vr WHERE vr.effective_date = ( SELECT MAX(effective_date) FROM VisaRequirement WHERE from_country = vr.from_country AND to_country = vr.to_country ) ) SELECT c.region as from_region, SUM(CASE WHEN lr.requirement_type = 'visa_free_access' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as visa_free_access, SUM(CASE WHEN lr.requirement_type = 'visa_required' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as visa_required, SUM(CASE WHEN lr.requirement_type = 'visa_on_arrival' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as visa_on_arrival, SUM(CASE WHEN lr.requirement_type = 'visa_online' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as visa_online, SUM(CASE WHEN lr.requirement_type = 'electronic_travel_authorisation' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as electronic_travel_authorisation FROM latest_requirements lr JOIN Country c ON lr.from_country = c.code GROUP BY c.region ORDER BY c.region
regional_visa_patterns.title: Region-to-Region Visa Patterns
regional_visa_patterns.description: Shows visa requirement patterns between world regions. Parameters: from_region and to_region (e.g., 'EUROPE', 'ASIA'), year=YYYY for historical data.

recent_changes.sql: WITH dates AS ( SELECT DISTINCT effective_date FROM VisaRequirement ORDER BY effective_date DESC LIMIT 2 ), curr AS (SELECT MAX(effective_date) as d FROM dates), prev AS (SELECT MIN(effective_date) as d FROM dates), counts AS ( SELECT c.region, vr.requirement_type, SUM(CASE WHEN vr.effective_date = (SELECT d FROM curr) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cur_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN vr.effective_date = (SELECT d FROM prev) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as prev_cnt FROM VisaRequirement vr JOIN Country c ON vr.from_country = c.code WHERE vr.effective_date IN (SELECT effective_date FROM dates) GROUP BY c.region, vr.requirement_type ) SELECT (SELECT d FROM curr) as current_date, region as from_region, SUM(CASE WHEN requirement_type='visa_free_access' THEN cur_cnt - prev_cnt ELSE 0 END) as visa_free_access, SUM(CASE WHEN requirement_type='visa_required' THEN cur_cnt - prev_cnt ELSE 0 END) as visa_required, SUM(CASE WHEN requirement_type='visa_on_arrival' THEN cur_cnt - prev_cnt ELSE 0 END) as visa_on_arrival, SUM(CASE WHEN requirement_type='visa_online' THEN cur_cnt - prev_cnt ELSE 0 END) as visa_online, SUM(CASE WHEN requirement_type='electronic_travel_authorisation' THEN cur_cnt - prev_cnt ELSE 0 END) as electronic_travel_authorisation FROM counts GROUP BY region HAVING SUM(ABS(cur_cnt - prev_cnt)) > 0 ORDER BY from_region
recent_changes.title: Recent Changes Summary
recent_changes.description: Shows net changes in visa requirement counts per region between the two most recent scrapes. Each column shows the increase/decrease in country-pairs with that requirement type.

Country.description: Information about countries included in the passport index

CountryRanking.description: Annual rankings and visa-free travel counts for countries
